---
title: "Hello!"
---

Binh Vu (pronounced like the ~bad~ search engine). Senior majoring in Economics and Statistics at [Lawrence University](https://www.lawrence.edu/), will probably be in grad school soon.

[About](about.qmd) has a little more about me, and [Things](things.qmd) reveal my impeccable weltanschauung.

Currently taking: [Regression Analysis](learning/regress/index.qmd), [Advanced Data Computing](learning/datacomp/index.qmd), and [Numerical Analysis](learning/numana/index.qmd). Past work can be accessed via [Projects](/projects/index.qmd).

Reach out!

::: {.contact-links}
[{{< fa envelope >}}](mailto:vub@lawrence.edu)
[{{< fa brands linkedin >}}](https://www.linkedin.com/in/vub23/)
[{{< fa brands github >}}](https://www.github.com/vub23/)
:::
